name: literature-search-europepmc
description: Long-tail stub for the literature_search_europepmc deepmind skill. Search Europe PMC for scientific literature and download open-access full texts and PDFs. Retrieve full-text XML/plain text by PMCID, get citation lists and bibliography.
author: zorai

run.description: Forward a literature_search_europepmc CLI invocation. Calls `python scripts/europepmc_api.py` with the deepmind subcommand and args you provide. Read `skills/scientific-skills-gdm/<skill>/SKILL.md` (relative to the repo root) for the canonical workflow and the full subcommand surface. Required env: `LITERATURE_SEARCH_EUROPEPMC_ARGS` (the deepmind subcommand plus its flags).
